entries.source: Chat Edit: 'create a digestion reverse engineering system that can continue this process for additional methods '

Chat Edit: 'A digestion reverse engineering system has been created:

digestion_reverse_engineering.h and digestion_reverse_engineering.cpp define an agentic system that scans source files for stubs/placeholders, generates agentic extension plans, applies agentic automation (logging, error handling, async, subsystem integration), and can chain to other files for recursive coverage.
This system can now be invoked to continue the agentic automation process for additional methods and files, enabling autonomous, cursor-level codebase extension. Let me know if you want to integrate or trigger it on specific files next!

Please feel free to fully enhance it for every other language as well '
Chat Edit: 'fully add full reverse engineering logic and support for language-specific patterns and agentic automation but only in other directions along with fully enhancing the '
